ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., forward, defense, goalie) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_games" INTEGER /* Number of regular season games */,
  "playoff_games" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "game_winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-winning goals */,
  "shorthanded_goals" INTEGER /* Number of shorthanded goals */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken */,
  "average_ice_time" REAL /* Average ice time per game (in minutes) */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Calder Trophy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season when the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id", "player_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty (e.g., hooking, holding) */,
  "penalty_date" TEXT /* Date the penalty was incurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes incurred */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the coach */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_teams" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id", "team_id", "season_id")
)
